zh: 永久提升初始最大生命。

en: Start runs with bonus equipment in your inventory.
zh: 开局时库存中附带额外装备。

en: 1 random common equipment in inventory at run start
zh: 开局时库存中获得1件随机普通装备

en: 2 random common equipment in inventory at run start
zh: 开局时库存中获得2件随机普通装备

en: 2 commons + 1 uncommon in inventory at run start
zh: 开局时库存中获得2件普通+1件罕见装备

en: Improve the quality of cards offered after battles.
zh: 提升战斗后提供的卡牌品质。

en: +5% chance to upgrade a draft card to uncommon
zh: 抽取卡牌升为罕见的几率+5%

en: +10% chance to upgrade a draft card to uncommon
zh: 抽取卡牌升为罕见的几率+10%

en: +15% uncommon and +5% rare in draft cards
Negotiate better prices at the merchant.
zh: 在商人处谈出更优惠的价格。

en: Begin each run with extra gold from your stockpile.
zh: 每场冒险开局时从储备中获得额外金币。

en: Distribute extra attribute points at the start of each run.
zh: 每场冒险开局时分配额外属性点。

en: +1 random attribute point at run start
+2 random attribute points at run start
+3 random attribute points at run start
Salvage research notes to add stronger cards to the draft pool.
zh: 回收研究笔记，将更强的卡牌加入抽取池。
解锁垂死一搏+先发制人

en: Carry more loot out of the wasteland — adds backpack cells.
zh: 从废土带走更多战利品——增加背包格子。

en: Carry reroll tokens that re-roll a reward card draft.
zh: 携带刷新令牌，可重掷奖励卡牌的选项。
